{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Larrin Tessella
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Larrin Tessella]] is [[Jyrine]]'s father.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“You are Larrin Tessella.” That was her father’s name, but the man pronounced the words all wrong, like he was choking out a demand instead of asking a polite question.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
